markdown:
# Burglar's Pack

A Burglar's Pack contains the following items: [[backpack]], [[ball_bearings]], [[bell]], 10 [[candle|Candles]], [[crowbar]], [[hooded_lantern]], 7 flasks of [[oil]], 5 days of [[rations]], [[rope]], [[tinderbox]], and [[waterskin]].
